DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT BY FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY TO PLTF'S COMPLT FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES WERE MADE BY THE PARTIES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS TO ALLEGE DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE OF AN EXISTING RELATIONSHIP AND DEFENDANT'S INTENTIONAL OR NEGLIGENT INTERFERING ACTS, IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
